idea: Satellite-measured nighttime light intensity spikes indicate increased tech data center activity

data.source: NASA Black Marble Nighttime Lights API

behavior: Sudden increases in nighttime light emissions from known data center locations suggest heightened cloud computing demand.

market_impact.rationale: XLK includes major cloud and data center operators whose revenues correlate with data usage intensity.

trade_logic.entry: If 3-day average nighttime light intensity in data center regions rises >10% vs prior month average
trade_logic.exit: After 7 trading days or if intensity falls below prior month average
